title: High Value Customers with Consistent Orders
description: Identify customers who have placed at least two orders and whose total spending across all their orders exceeds 500. Return the customer name along with their total spending.
solution: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name HAVING SUM(o.amount) > 500 AND COUNT(o.id) >= 2;
